name: Vapman Filling Funnel (2x)
summary: Keep your filling process clean and precise with the Vapman Filling Funnel set.
description: Keep your filling process clean and precise with the Vapman Filling Funnel set. Designed specifically for Vapman vaporisers, these compact funnels make loading your device simple, accurate, and completely mess-free — ideal for both personal and professional use. Each funnel fits securely over the Vapman heating pan, ensuring herbs drop neatly into place without spillage. The smooth interior design minimises waste and speeds up refilling, making it a practical tool for efficient, everyday vaporiser use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
